method: compare 4 incomplete stores against 5-store BARE-NAME sample (AMM/AFT/AYEVO/UPTC/AYSOL); identify ONLY the groups directly required by S238 to keep within the v1.1 plan's ALLOWED_ACCOUNT_NAMES = {Stock Assets, Accounts Payable, Current Assets} and HB-1 (max 4 groups per store)

sample_canonical_chain_observed.Stock Assets: Stock Assets - <ABBR> -> Current Assets - <ABBR> -> Application of Funds (Assets) - <ABBR>
sample_canonical_chain_observed.Accounts Payable: Accounts Payable - <ABBR> -> Current Liabilities - <ABBR> -> Source of Funds (Liabilities) - <ABBR>

deviation_from_canonical: Asset side: parent Current Assets to target stores existing 1100000 - ASSETS - <ABBR> (saves 1 group). Liability side: parent Accounts Payable to existing 2104000 - INTERCOMPANY PAYABLES - <ABBR> (Frappe rejects creating a 2nd top-level Liability root). Taxonomic compromise: AP appears as sub-category of IC PAYABLES on these 4 stores. S238 _find_parent_group_for queries by account_name (BARE), not parent chain — so deviation does NOT break S238. Closeout SUMMARY records as follow-up sprint candidate (S244+) to harmonize CoA fully alongside B8 verifier extension.

groups_to_create.rationale: S238 Phase 1-T1 needs this parent for Input VAT - BKI Inter-Co leaf. account_name BARE per BARE-NAME convention. Reuses target-store's existing Asset root.
S238 Phase 1-T1 needs this parent for Inventory-from-Commissary leaf. account_name BARE; chains under new Current Assets per canonical pattern.

S238 Phase 1-T1 needs this parent for AP-Trade-BKI leaf. Parented to existing 2104000 - INTERCOMPANY PAYABLES - <ABBR> because Frappe rejects 2nd top-level Liability root (each Company has exactly one Liability root). Taxonomic compromise: AP appears as sub-category of IC PAYABLES on these 4 stores; S238 lookup by account_name unaffected.
